name: E-Commerce Website
shortDescription: A full-stack e-commerce platform with cart, payment system, and admin dashboard.
challenges: Handling secure payment integration and managing complex cart state.
futurePlans: Add AI product recommendation system and improve performance with caching.

name: Portfolio Website
shortDescription: A modern responsive personal portfolio built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
challenges: Designing a clean UI and making it fully responsive across all devices.
futurePlans: Add blog system and dark/light mode toggle with better animations.

name: Blog Platform
shortDescription: A blogging platform with authentication and markdown support.
challenges: Implementing secure authentication and markdown rendering.
futurePlans: Add comment system, likes, and social sharing features.
